EmailTemplate.name: Trustee Followup Email Template
EmailTemplate.subject: Status of Insolvency - {!Insolvency__c.Name}/{!Insolvency_Account__c.Name}/{!Insolvency__c.Debtor_1_First_Name__c} {!Insolvency__c.Debtor_1_Last_Name__c}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Attn: Administrator/Trustee
Dear Sir / Madam,
In an effort to keep our records current, we are kindly requesting an update for the above-noted Insolvency filed with your office. According to our records we have not received an expected dividend for the below mentioned account(s):
{!AccountList}
Please advise if the Insolvency is:
Ongoing
Has our claim been received and admitted? Have any dividends been issued / when can we expect dividends?
Annulled
Date of annulment and Trustee discharge? Has a subsequent bankruptcy been filed? If yes, please provide new Estate information
Discharged
Date of full performance? Were any dividends issued for the account(s) listed?
Any other information that you may be able to provide would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you in advance for your assistance.
Sincerely
Canaccede International Management Ltd. Insolvency Department
Canaccede International Management Ltd PO Box 9 STN B London | Ontario | N6A 4Y8 Tel: 844-202-6780 | Fax: 855-914-7653 Email: www.canaccede.com
